title: Lizard
content:
{{CharHub|Lizard|Curt Connors}} {{MarvelLegacy|Sony|[[Rageful Vigilante Spider-Man Universe]]|4=Characters|6=''The Amazing Spider-Man'' or ''The Amazing Spider-Man 2''}} {{Character |name = Lizard |image = Lizard (SM NWH) official site.jpg |real name = {{Conjecture|Curtis}} ConnorsThis character's name comes from ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man (film)|The Amazing Spider-Man}}''. |alias = {{Alias |primary = Curt Connors{{Ref|SMNWH}} |codenames = Lizard{{Ref|SMNWH}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}}
{{Citizenship|GRBR}}
{{Citizenship|ENG}} |gender = Male |title = Doctor |movie = ''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]'' |affiliation = {{WPS|Oscorp#The Amazing Spider-Man duology|Oscorp}} (formerly) |actor = [[Rhys Ifans]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|When you try to fix people, there are always consequences.|Lizard|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Doctor '''{{Conjecture|Curtis}} "Curt" Connors''' is a scientist who became known as '''Lizard''' after a self-inflicted experiment transformed him. With the desire to turn the rest of the [[human]] race into lizards, he was challenged by [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]], and ultimately defeated. However, Lizard was transported through the [[Multiverse]] to another universe by [[Doctor Strange]]'s failed [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]], where he was swiftly [[Capture of Lizard|captured]]. Lizard was then convinced by the other multiverse travellers to allow [[Spider-Man]] to try and cure them, only for [[Green Goblin]] to [[Escape from Spider-Man|destroy]] these plans. Lizard then joined the other villains in a [[Battle at Liberty Island|final battle]] against the three Spider-Men, until he was defeated, [[Lizard Antidote|turned back]] into a human and sent back to his universe. ==Biography== {{MD|Curtis Connors (Earth-120703)||1}} ===Early Life=== ====Becoming Lizard==== {{Quote|He tried to turn the whole [[New York City|city]] into lizards. It was crazy."
"It wasn't crazy, Max. It was the next step in [[human]] evolution.|[[Electro]] and Lizard|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Curt Connors was a brilliant scientist at {{WPS|Oscorp#The Amazing Spider-Man duology|Oscorp}} with a missing right arm, and during his time there, he met the electrician [[Max Dillon]]. Experimenting on himself with a serum he developed, Connors transformed into a mutant Lizard, a dangerously manic alter-ego. While in Lizard form, he believed that he had achieved the next stage of [[human]] evolution and attempted to release his serum throughout [[New York City]] in order to transform everyone into humanoid lizards. However, he was stopped, defeated and ultimately cured by [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]], who put an end to his plans.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ===[[Spider-Man Multiversal Crisis]]=== ====Brought to Another Universe==== [[File:Lizard startles Parker.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard scares [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|I detected an otherworldly presence, I pursued it into the sewers, where I found that slimy, green son of a gun.|[[Doctor Strange]] to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} One day, Lizard found himself transported to another universe. Arriving in the sewers of [[New York City]] in the year [[2024]], he was discovered by [[Doctor Strange]], who captured him and contained him in the dungeon of the [[New York Sanctum]]. After a short while, Lizard was crouching in his cell when he noticed this universe's [[Peter Parker]] outside, so he pounced at the invisible barrier entrapping him and roared, frightening Parker. [[File:Lizard (No Way Home).png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard sits in his cell]] While Strange explained the [[Multiverse|Multiversal]] incident to Parker, the latter took a glance into Lizard's cell, and the humanoid reptile stared back at him. He then sat down and watched Parker and Strange discuss searching for the Multiversal travelers. Later that day, [[Michelle Jones]] and [[Ned Leeds]] entered the chamber, and when Leeds excitedly questioned if Lizard was a dinosaur, Lizard scowled, unamused. During Parker, Jones and Leeds' preparations to search for travelers, Lizard sat in his cell, bored, and tossed a stone pebble. [[File:The Lizard (Spider-Man No Way Home).png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard speaks to [[Electro]]]] Following the [[Capture of Electro|captures]] of [[Electro]] and [[Sandman]], Lizard recognized the former and laughed. Electro explained Lizard's background to everyone in the chamber, including his plot to transform everyone in [[New York City]] into lizards like himself, which he labeled as insanity. Lizard shamelessly defended his actions as the next phase in [[human]] evolution. He also took note of Electro's physical changes, such as how his repaired teeth, lack of glasses and a new haircut, asking if he got a makeover. Eager, Lizard offered to give Electro a "real makeover" by transforming him into a lizard as well, but they were silenced by Sandman.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====Offered Help==== [[File:Lizard (NWH).png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard asks [[Electro]] if he dies]] {{Quote|You don't have to come. I also didn't know you could talk. But if you stay [[New York Sanctum|here]], you're gonna have to deal with the [[Doctor Strange|wizard]]."
"So we go along or die. Well, not much of a choice, isn't it?|[[Spider-Man]] and Lizard|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} The next day, Lizard leaned against the wall when he witnessed [[Norman Osborn]] arriving in the [[New York Sanctum]] dungeon. He then observed the conversation between Osborn, [[Doctor Octopus]] and [[Electro]] as they realized they were resurrected upon being summoned into this universe. This made Lizard anxious and concerned about his own fate, asking Electro if he himself died. [[Doctor Strange]] then returned and tried to use the [[Macchina di Kadavus]] to transport the [[Multiverse|Multiversal]] travelers back to their home universes, making Lizard and the others nervous and uneasy.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====[[Escape from Spider-Man|Escaping from Spider-Man]]==== [[File:LIZARD.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard hears the arrival of ''[[The Daily Bugle]]'']] {{Quote|I told you there'd be consequences!|Lizard to [[Spider-Man]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} In an attempt to save them from their destined fates, [[Peter Parker]] and his [[May Parker|aunt]] brought them in a [[F.E.A.S.T.]] truck to [[Happy Hogan]]'s [[Happy Hogan's Condominium|condominium]] to work on cures for their conditions, though Lizard believed the plan was doomed to failure and elected to stay outside in the truck. [[File:Lizard escapes.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard escapes the [[F.E.A.S.T.]] truck]] When [[J. Jonah Jameson]] and his ''[[The Daily Bugle|Daily Bugle]]'' crew arrived, Lizard observed from inside the truck and remarked how things were beginning to go wrong as he anticipated. After [[Green Goblin]] attacked Spider-Man, allowing [[Electro]] and [[Sandman]] to escape, Lizard broke out of the truck, startling Jameson and the [[Damage Control|Department of Damage Control]] agents who were nearby. [[File:The Lizard vs. Spider-Man.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard attacks [[Spider-Man]]]] Lizard then jumped up onto the outside of the building and grabbed Spider-Man, stating that he warned him that there would be consequences. He then threw Spider-Man through a window towards Green Goblin before making his escape.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====[[Battle at Liberty Island]]==== [[File:LizardAwesomeLook.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard arrives at the [[Statue of Liberty]]]] {{Quote|Hey, Dr. Connors."
"Hello, Peter.|[[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]] and Lizard|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Hours later, Lizard, alongside [[Sandman]] and [[Electro]], arrived at the [[Statue of Liberty]] to [[Battle at Liberty Island|confront]] [[Spider-Man]], who was joined by [[Amazing Spider-Man]] and [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|another Spider-Man]]. [[File:Lizard vs. Spider-Man.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard fights [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]]] Lizard engaged in a fight against Spider-Man and proceeded to chase him up a construction crew's crane. During the fight, they knocked over the crane, which impeded Sandman in the process. Lizard was then pinned down by the fallen crane in the scaffolding, much to his irritation. [[File:Spider-Man & Lizard.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard attacks his [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]]] Lizard recovered and joined Electro and Sandman in confronting the Spider-Men. After they charged at each other, Lizard was kicked by Amazing Spider-Man and the two resumed their scuffle below. Lizard managed to pin him down; however, Spider-Man managed to fight back and trapped Lizard in his [[Synthetic Webbing]]. [[File:Lizard (Curt Connors).png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard hears [[Michelle Jones]] and [[Ned Leeds]]]] As Lizard worked to break himself free, he heard [[Ned Leeds]] and [[Michelle Jones]] and looked up to the next level of scaffolding, seeing an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] opened. Knowing that they had the [[Macchina di Kadavus]], Lizard tore himself free and jumped up onto the scaffolding. [[File:Lizard runs to the portal.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard runs into [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]]]] Lizard surprised them and jumped through the portal leading into [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] and found himself in one of Midtown's laboratory rooms. He chased Leeds and Jones through the room, but was temporarily stopped when Leeds' Spider-Man jumped into the portal and fought him. [[File:The Lizard.png|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard pursues after [[Michelle Jones]] and [[Ned Leeds]]]] Lizard quickly tossed Spider-Man across the room, destroying lab tables and chairs in the process before following Leeds and Jones through another portal leaving Midtown. After nearly catching up with them again, Leeds opened another portal and a burst of water came through right into Lizard's path, causing him to be stalled. [[File:The Lizard.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Lizard attempts to attack that universe's [[Spider-Man]]]] As Spider-Man returned and continued to hold Lizard at bay, Jones threw Lizard's [[Lizard Antidote|cure]] in their direction. When Lizard rushed to bite Spider-Man, he held up the cure, causing Lizard to sink his teeth in it and was promptly hit by a gas cloud causing him to be knocked backwards. [[File:Curt Connors.png|{{AltFloat}}|Connors is cured]] Parker, Leeds, Jones, and the newly arrived [[Doctor Strange]] watched as Lizard was reverted to Connors, who looked around and became emotional due to the loss of his right arm and the weight of his actions setting in. [[File:Curt Connors returns to his universe.png|{{AltFloat}}|Connors is returned to his universe]] [[Green Goblin]] then arrived and planted a [[Pumpkin Bombs|Pumpkin Bomb]] inside the Macchina. The bomb detonated, exploding the Macchina and freeing the unstable spell, which created a dimensional rift that caused the scaffolding of the Statue to collapse. Connors was saved by [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man]] and brought to safety on the ground. When Strange cast the [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]] to make everyone in that universe forget their Peter Parker, Connors was successfully sent back to his universe.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Former Powers=== {{Quote|He turned himself into a lizard.|[[Electro]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} *'''Artificially Enhanced Physiology''': Connors transformed himself into a giant mutant lizard after experimenting with cross-species genetics; he harnessed the DNA of a lizard and transferred its capabilities to himself, granting him enhanced reptilian physical attributes. **'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:Lizard (2024).png|thumb|250px|Lizard overpowering [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]]] Connors has remarkable superhuman strength, able to lift weight that no human ever could. He is able to tear through steel and metals effortlessly, and overpower multiple men with ease. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Connors' skin, bone, and muscle tissue are denser and tougher than ordinary humans. **'''Superhuman Speed''': Connors has the ability to travel at great speeds. **'''Superhuman Agility''': In his Lizard form, Connors possess a level of agility superior to humans. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Connors can do intense physical activity for long periods of time without being fatigued. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Connors can coordinate his body with unnatural equilibrium, dexterity, and flexibility and his reflexes is capable of reacting much better than ordinary human beings. **'''Enhanced Senses''': Connors has superhuman senses. He is able to see farther than ordinary, and can smell humans' scent from great distances. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Connors can heal much quicker than even Spider-Man. He could heal from multiple gunshot wounds within a few seconds, **'''Wall Crawling''': Connors uses his sharp claws to penetrate walls and crawl on them. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|Dr. Curt Connors, he was a scientist at {{WPS|Oscorp}} when I worked there. A brilliant scientist.|[[Electro]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Connors has a genius-level intelligence. In his universe, he was a renowned herpetologist. *'''Master Scientist''': Connors is a master scientist on his universe as a herpetologist. Even as the monstrous Lizard, he still retains a warped intelligence. *'''Expert Combatant''': [[File:Spider-Man vs. Lizard.png|thumb|250px|Lizard fighting against [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]]] Despite having no formal combat training, in his Lizard form, due to his powers that combined with his natural savagery, Connors caused himself to become a fierce hand-to-hand combatant. *'''Master Acrobat''': Connors' acrobatic feats are enhanced as Lizard. ==Equipment== ===Vehicles === {{Quote|Where's Connors?"
"He told me he wanted to stay in the truck.|[[Spider-Man]] and [[May Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} *'''F.E.A.S.T. Truck''': Lizard was transported to [[Happy Hogan]]'s [[Happy Hogan's Condominium|condominium]] from the [[New York Sanctum]] in the truck, but he chose to remain outside the complex. When the [[Green Goblin]] and [[Electro]] began to attack [[Spider-Man]] and [[Otto Octavius]] respectively, Lizard busted his way out of the truck and ran away from the scene. ==Facilities== *'''[[Midtown School of Science and Technology]]''': Lizard jumped through an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] and entered Midtown's laboratory room to attack [[Michelle Jones]] and [[Ned Leeds]], who were in possession of the [[Macchina di Kadavus]]. ===Prisons=== *'''[[New York Sanctum]]''': After being defeated by [[Doctor Strange]], Lizard was transported to the Sanctum's prison, where he was contained until [[Spider-Man]] freed him to cure the multiversal visitors. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *{{WPS|Oscorp#The Amazing Spider-Man duology|Oscorp}} **[[Electro|Max Dillon/Electro]] - Former Colleague *[[Amazing Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] - Former Enemy and Curer *[[Doctor Octopus|Otto Octavius/Doctor Octopus]] *[[Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] - Temporary Enemy and Curer *[[Michelle Jones]] - Former Enemy *[[Ned Leeds]] - Former Enemy *[[Sandman|Flint Marko/Sandman]] *[[Green Goblin|Norman Osborn/Green Goblin]] *[[May Parker]] † *[[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] - Temporary Enemy and Savior {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Masters of the Mystic Arts]] **[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] - Former Captor *[[United States Department of Damage Control]] *''[[The Daily Bugle]]'' **[[J. Jonah Jameson]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Curt Connors was a military surgeon who had his right arm amputated due to an injury. In an attempt to get his arm back, Connors tried to use a serum of lizard DNA to gain regeneration powers, but due to a failure, he was turned into a reptilian monster known as the '''Lizard'''. *In ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man (film)|The Amazing Spider-Man}}'', Dr. Curt Connors is a scientist who tried to regrow his severed limb through experiments with lizards. However, this caused him to turn into a lizard-like creature. Connors then vowed to turn all of [[New York City]] into lizards only to be stopped by [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]. *In ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man (film)|The Amazing Spider-Man}}'', Lizard's right claw has four fingers instead of five, since his right hand was artificially regrown. This continuity detail was kept for ''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]''. *Prior to appearing in [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]], Lizard and [[Sandman]] were the only two Spider-Man's rogues who survived the events of their respective films. *In ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man (film)|The Amazing Spider-Man}}'', Lizard looked less reptilian and lacked a snout, but for ''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]'', he was slightly redesigned with a slightly more reptilian face, lizard-like groves and a more pronounced snout. ==Behind the Scenes== *Curt Connors in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from [[Marc Webb]]'s {{WPS|Spider-Man in film#Marc Webb films (2012–2014)|''The Amazing Spider-Man'' duology}} from [[Sony Pictures Entertainment]], who was also portrayed by [[Rhys Ifans]]; he is the third live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by {{WPS|Dylan Baker}} in [[Sam Raimi]]'s {{WPS|Spider-Man in film#Sam Raimi films (2002–2007)|''Spider-Man'' trilogy}} and another from the {{WPS|Broadway}} musical ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Turn Off the Dark}}''. *When Lizard transforms back into his human form as Curt Connors, footage from ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man (film)|The Amazing Spider-Man}}'' of [[Rhys Ifans]] as the character was superimposed into the scene. ==References== {{Gallery|Lizard/Gallery}} {{Wq|Lizard}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Lizard}} *{{Marvel|Curtis Connors (Earth-120703)}} *{{WP|Lizard (character)|Lizard}} [[es:Curtis Connors]] [[ru:Ящер]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: No Way Home Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Blond Hair]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Yellow Eyes]] [[Category:Scientists]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]]
